menu_promo_body: Open the schedule and inspect client details.
pin_subtitle: Used when biometrics are not available.
pin_error_tooShort: PIN must be at least 6 digits.
deviceLimit_subtitle: Sign out from another device to continue here.
offline_body: Tricho works without the internet. Open the schedule, browse clients, and capture photos — everything will sync when the connection is back.
camera_permissionMessage: Camera access is required to capture photos.
offline_pageBody: Tricho works without the internet. Open the schedule, browse clients, capture photos — sync will resume when the connection is back.
pin_setupDescription: This device does not support biometric key derivation, so we'll use a PIN as the daily unlock. The PIN stays on this device — the server never sees it.
pin_unlockDescription: Enter your PIN to unlock the vault on this device.
settings_syncDescription: Turn sync on to replicate your encrypted data to the server. The server only ever sees ciphertext.
settings_rsRotationDescription: Generates a new Recovery Secret, re-wraps your vault key with it, and replaces the old wrap. Your old RS stops working after this.
settings_signedInError: Not signed in to the sync server.
deviceLimit_descriptionWith: Your {tier} plan allows {limit} devices. Revoke one of your existing devices to add this one, or upgrade.
deviceLimit_descriptionWithout: Your plan does not allow more devices. Revoke one of your existing devices to add this one, or upgrade.
deviceLimit_noOtherDevices: No other devices found. Try again.
deviceLimit_sessionExpired_full: Session expired. Please sign in again.
appShell_deviceLimitHint: You have reached the device limit on your plan ({limit}). Revoke an existing device to add this one.
appShell_deviceLimitFallback: Revoke an existing device to add this one.
appShell_deviceLimitInstructions: Open Tricho on one of your existing devices, open Settings → Devices, and revoke the one you no longer use. Then come back here and sign in again.
plan_freeBlurb: Use Tricho on this single device. Your data stays here.
plan_renewalRequiredBody: Renew to resume cross-device sync and backups.
plan_inGraceBody: Sync continues until {date}. Renew to keep using Tricho across devices.
plan_pickerBankSubtitle: One payment, one period. No auto-renewal.
billing_payInstructions: Send the amount with the variable symbol below — usually arrives within a few hours.
billing_orScanQr: Or scan the QR with your bank app
plan_localBackup_blurb: Pick a calendar month — Tricho packages everything into a single ZIP you can save to your computer.
plan_localBackup_empty: No data for this month yet.
plan_localBackup_done: Backup ready — saved to your downloads folder.
restore_zip_blurb: Select your saved {filename} files. We'll merge them into this device's vault — your existing local data wins on conflict.
restore_zip_recoverySecret_help: Required to unlock the backup contents on this device.
restore_zip_error_invalid: That file is not a Tricho backup.
restore_zip_error_vault: This backup is for a different vault.
restore_zip_error_version: Backup format is too new for this app — please update.
wizard_step1_ios_step1: Tap the share icon in the bottom bar
wizard_step1_ios_step1_hint: in Safari, between address and bookmarks
wizard_step1_ios_step2_hint: scroll the list down if you don't see it
wizard_step1_ios_step3_hint: the app appears on your home screen
wizard_step1_android_step1: Tap the ⋮ menu in the top right
wizard_step1_android_step3_hint: the icon appears in your app drawer
wizard_step1_other_step2_hint: Safari or Chrome give the best experience
wizard_step1_other_step3: Open the app from your home screen
wizard_step1_post_title: Open Tricho.App from your home screen
wizard_step1_post_body: The app is on your home or app screen. Tap its icon and the wizard will be there to greet you.
wizard_step1_post_warning: You can't go any further here — your data wouldn't be safe in a browser tab.
wizard_step2_footer: Tricho.App never gets your password or your inbox — it only confirms it's you.
wizard_step3_new_qr_warning: Your key. Without it, your data is gone.
wizard_step3_new_qr_iosLongPressHint: On iPhone the image won't auto-save — long-press the QR and choose “Save Image”.
wizard_step3_new_verify_camera_sub: opens the camera; point it at your saved QR
wizard_step3_new_verify_gallery_sub: pick the image you just downloaded
wizard_step3_new_verify_last4_title: Type the last 4 characters of your key
wizard_step3_new_verify_mismatch: Those 4 characters don't match the key.
wizard_step3_new_verify_qr_mismatch: That QR doesn't match your key. Try again, or type the last 4 characters.
wizard_step3_new_webauthn_success: Key verified. Now we'll bind it to your device biometrics — next time you'll sign in with a fingerprint or face.
wizard_step3_new_webauthn_failed: Biometric activation didn't work. Try again.
wizard_step3_existing_qr_camera_sub: point the camera at a saved image or printout
wizard_step3_existing_qr_gallery_sub: the QR image you previously downloaded
wizard_step3_existing_qr_invalidFormat: That key doesn't look right — check it and try again.
wizard_step3_existing_qr_unwrapFailed: That key doesn't open this vault. Try a different one or double-check it's the right one.
wizard_step3_existing_qr_decodeFailed: Couldn't read a QR from that image. Try another photo or type the key manually.
wizard_step3_existing_webauthn_success: Key recognised. Your data is being decrypted now. We'll bind it to your device biometrics.
wizard_step3_existing_webauthn_failed: Biometric activation didn't work. Try again.
wizard_final_sub: Open today and write your first visit.
lock_subtitle: The diary is locked. One tap and we're in.
lock_error_wrongPin: That PIN doesn't fit. Try again.
lock_error_wrongRs: That Recovery Secret doesn't fit. Make sure it's the latest one.
lock_error_wrongCredential: The unlock key was refused. Try again.
lock_error_unknown: Something didn't go right. Try again in a moment.
settings_pinSetupDescription: Set a local PIN you'll use to unlock the diary on this device. The PIN never leaves your phone.
settings_pinChangeDescription: Change the PIN for unlocking the diary on this device.
rotateRs_blurb: We'll generate a new key, show it to you, then ask you to confirm it before the old one stops working.
rotateRs_warningOldStops: Your old Recovery Secret will stop working the moment you confirm the new one.
rotateRs_successTitle: Done. Your new key is here —
showRs_blurb: Type your current Recovery Secret. We'll verify it and re-render the QR so you can save it again.
showRs_error_invalidFormat: That doesn't look like a Recovery Secret. Check the format.
showRs_error_wrongKey: That key doesn't match this device's vault.
settings_showRsDescription: Re-display the QR so you can save it again. We'll ask you to type the current key first.
settings_restoreZipDescription: Apply documents from a .tricho-backup.zip file. Useful when migrating between devices or recovering after a wipe.
wizard_step3_existing_haveZip: I don't have my Recovery key — but I have a backup ZIP
wizard_step3_restoreZip_pick_blurb: Pick the .tricho-backup.zip file (or several — one per month). We'll restore them in order.
wizard_step3_restoreZip_verify_blurb: Type the Recovery Secret you saved when you created the vault. We'll verify it before applying any data.
wizard_step3_restoreZip_verify_unavailab: Restore is not available right now. Please try again later.
deviceLimit_cannotRevokeSelf: This device can't sign itself out — use Logout in Settings instead.
gatedSheet_body: Your data stays on this device. Sync will resume the moment you renew. Until then, keep working offline — nothing is lost.
planPreview_freeBlurb: One device, no cloud — perfect for trying things out.
planPreview_proBlurb: Two devices, encrypted cloud sync, 12-month backups.
planPreview_maxBlurb: Five devices, encrypted cloud sync, 5-year backups.
deleteAccount_body: This removes your server account, revokes every device, and wipes all local data on this phone. There is no undo. Type the word below to confirm.
deleteAccount_error_server: Deletion didn't go through. Try again in a moment.
settings_deleteAccountDescription: Permanently remove your account, revoke every device, and wipe local data. There is no undo.
oauthError_providerCancelled: Sign-in was cancelled. Try again or pick another provider.
oauthError_providerError: The provider returned an error. Try again in a moment.
oauthError_deviceBlocked: The server refused this session. Try signing in again.
oauthError_unknown: Something didn't go right. Try again in a moment.
